task_description: retrieve the SSL certificate expiration date for python.org
code:
echo "Retrieving SSL certificate expiration date for python.org..."
timeout 10 openssl s_client -connect python.org:443 -servername python.org 2>/dev/null | openssl x509 -noout -enddate
